questions.question: What is the most important reason to respond to leads within 5 minutes?

options.text: Research shows you're 100x more likely to connect than if you wait an hour

questions.explanation: InsideSales.com research shows responding within 5 minutes makes you 100x more likely to connect versus waiting an hour. Speed is the #1 conversion lever the Lead Catcher enables.

questions.question: Which CRM action should you use to prevent duplicate contacts?
questions.explanation: Always use 'Create or Update Contact' (or 'Upsert'). It checks if a contact with that email already exists and updates it instead of creating a duplicate. This is essential for data quality.

questions.question: The Lead Catcher should auto-send a response email to the prospect immediately.
questions.explanation: False. The Lead Catcher notifies YOU so you can respond personally. Auto-responses often feel robotic and reduce conversion. The human response should be personalized — the automation just makes sure you respond within minutes.

questions.question: Which three metadata fields must be set automatically on every new lead?

options.text: Lead Source, Pipeline Stage, Date Entered
Lead Source, Deal Size, Close Date

questions.explanation: Lead Source (for attribution), Pipeline Stage (for funnel tracking), and Date Entered (for velocity tracking) must be set automatically. These feed your Course 41 analytics dashboards.
